title: Tahrir 2011: The Good, the Bad, and the Politician
original_title: تحرير 2011 : الطيب و الشرس و السياسي
overview: Months after Hosni Mubarak stepped down, Egyptians country-wide seem determined to maintain the insurgency until their demands are met.
